zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath於1427年12月10日出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾登崔亞斯時，他的父親Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden37歲，母親Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus11424歲。他於大約1453年與Lady Matilda Stewart結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍享年59歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath于1427年12月10日出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾登崔亞斯时，他的父亲Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden37岁，母亲Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus11424岁。他于大约1453年与Lady Matilda Stewart结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍享年59岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

nameMeanings.name: Edmonstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath was born on 10 December 1427, in Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden, was 37 and his mother, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, was 11424. He married Lady Matilda Stewart about 1453. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1486, in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath est né le 10 décembre 1427, à Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, avait 11424 ans. Il a épousé Lady Matilda Stewart environ 1453. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1486, à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath am 10. Dezember 1427 in Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden 37 und seine Mutter Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus 11424. Er hat um 1453 Lady Matilda Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1486 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath è nato il il 10 dicembre 1427 nel Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, aveva 11424 anni. Lui sposato Lady Matilda Stewart circa 1453. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1486, nel Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreathが1427年12月10日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダントレアスで生まれた時，父Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Cullodenは37歳，母Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angusは11424歳であった。約1453年にLady Matilda Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランで59歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath(이)가 1427년 12월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 던트리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus(은)는 11424세였다. 그는 대략 1453년 Lady Matilda Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath nasceu em 10 de dezembro de 1427, em Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, tinha 11424 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Matilda Stewart aproximadamente 1453. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1486, em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath родился 10 декабря 1427 г. в местности дунтрит, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, 11424. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Matilda Stewart около 1453 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1486 г. в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath nació el 10 de diciembre de 1427, en Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Willem Edmonstone Liard van Dunreath en Culloden, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, tenía 11424 años. Se casó con Lady Matilda Stewart aproximadamente 1453. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1486, en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
